title: Second Rendez Vous (Redux) - A Journey Through Space & Sound
summary: Challenging, but rewarding. The final track is 7:27 minutes long, divided into seventeen sections, each with its own story and emotion - I could tell you about each one of them, but I believe it comes to you to define the meaning and the story of the track
thumbnail_alt: Cover art for the track release of 'Second Rendez-Vous', portraying Jean Michel Jarre, in a futuristic landscape scenario that is moving at the speed of light, a sunset in the background can be observed.
author: Zed Kaido

title: Bach's Ghost In The Machine
summary: A reimagined take on Bach's iconic Prelude no.1 and inspired by the haunting beauty of Charles Gounod's Ave Maria
thumbnail_alt: Cover art for the track release of 'Bach's Ghost In The Machine', portraying Bach inside a musical machine, half of the cover is a realistic portrait of Bach, and the other is a representation of his ghost
author: Zed Kaido

title:
I Quit Social Media,
Even as an Artist!
summary: Yeap, you read it right! I quit social media, even as an artist! Puff! Gone! No more! Why? I hear you ask: Read on to find out
thumbnail_alt: Blog post image showcasing the #quitsocialmedia hashtag in the middle (with the word social, striken out to represent the quite unsocial aspect of it) and the #JoinTheRealWorld hashtag in the corners.
author: Zed Kaido
